name: Hadza
notes: Classification-only clade node for Hadza, a language isolate (its own one-member family). Carries no phonology: it is only a step in the ancestry chain from which `family` is derived.

sources.author: Hammarström, Harald; Forkel, Robert; Haspelmath, Martin; Bank, Sebastian
sources.title: Glottolog 5.0
sources.publisher: Max Planck Institute for Evolutionary Anthropology
